name: Faraday Copper Corp.
description: Faraday Copper Corp. is a Canadian exploration and development company focused on advancing its flagship Copper Creek Project in Arizona, USA. The project is one of the largest undeveloped copper resources in North America, featuring a significant open pit and bulk underground mining potential. The company is committed to creating shareholder value through responsible exploration and development of its copper assets, leveraging a management team with extensive experience in the mining industry. Faraday Copper aims to support the global transition to a low-carbon economy by providing a reliable source of copper for electrification and sustainable infrastructure.
